sentences.en: If you're hungry, you have to eat.
When I get up, I always eat something.
I have to study, but I don't want to.
I'm sick, but I have to work.
My flight leaves on the fifteenth of June.
I don't know what I want; I like everything.

sentences.t: 마르코는 절대 안 피곤해요, 항상 준비됐을 뿐이에요.
sentences.en: Marco is never tired, just ready.
sentences.r: raenggwineun jeoldae an pigonhaeyo, hangsang junbidwaesseul ppunieyo.

sentences.en: I've been feeling bad for a week.
I'm much better now that I'm with you.
No, it's ten minutes by bus.

sentences.t: 제가 당신에 대해 뭘 아는지 모를걸요.
sentences.en: You don't know what I know about you.
sentences.r: jega dangsine daehae mwol aneunji moreulgeoryo.

sentences.t: 필요도 없는 걸 항상 사고 싶어 해요.
sentences.en: I always want to buy things I don't need.
sentences.r: piryodo eomneun geol hangsang sago sipeo haeyo.

sentences.en: The taxi is expensive, take the bus.

sentences.t: 추울 땐 그냥 집에 있는 게 좋아요.
sentences.en: I'd rather stay home when it's cold.
sentences.r: chuul ttaen geunyang jibe inneun ge joayo.

sentences.t: 커피 한 잔 더 시킬 것 같아요.
sentences.en: I think I'm going to order another coffee.
sentences.r: keopi han jan deo sikil geot gatayo.

sentences.en: It's that way, turn and go straight.
As a little kid, I was always with my friends.

sentences.t: 배가 안 고파서 아무것도 안 먹었어요.
sentences.en: I didn't eat anything because I wasn't hungry.
sentences.r: baega an gopaseo amugeotdo an meogeosseoyo.

sentences.en: My head hurts because I didn't sleep.
I'm so tired I can't think.
Marco loves Spanish, of course.
Who told you that I said that?
At the square, turn left.
I'm Marco, and I'm from everywhere.
Next week I have more time.
They say you eat really well here.

sentences.t: 춤출 줄 아는 사람을 만나고 싶어요.
sentences.en: I want to meet someone who knows how to dance.
sentences.r: chumchul jul aneun sarameul mannago sipeoyo.

sentences.t: 짐 있을 땐 안 걷는 게 나아요.
sentences.en: With suitcases, better not walk.
sentences.r: jim isseul ttaen an geonneun ge naayo.

sentences.en: I used to like it more, now not so much.

sentences.t: 완벽할 필요 없어요, 연습만 하면 돼요.
sentences.en: You don't need to be perfect, you just need to practice.
sentences.r: wanbyeokal piryo eopseoyo, yeonseumman hamyeon dwaeyo.

sentences.en: I'm happy because I'm finally learning.
Marco wants you to practice every day.
I'll come back when everything's calm.

sentences.t: 아는 언어가 많을수록 세상을 더 많이 알게 돼요.
sentences.en: The more languages I know, the more of the world I get to know.
sentences.r: aneun eoneoga maneulsurok sesangeul deo mani alge dwaeyo.

sentences.en: I'll give you this if you promise me something.
We ordered so much that the check is scary.

sentences.t: 비 올 때 집에 있는 거 좋아해요.
sentences.en: I like being home when it rains.
sentences.r: bi ol ttae jibe inneun geo joahaeyo.

sentences.en: Not today, not tomorrow either; Friday is better.
I have to pay for a lot of things this month.
I didn't like it because it was too long.
I'm selling it cheap because I don't use it.

sentences.t: 사실대로 말해도 돼요, 화 안 낼게요.
sentences.en: You can tell me the truth, I won't get mad.
sentences.r: sasildaero malhaedo dwaeyo, hwa an naelgeyo.

sentences.en: Marco says repeating is the key.

sentences.t: 다 같이 내요, 그게 더 싸요.
sentences.en: Let's all pay together, that way it's cheaper.
sentences.r: da gachi naeyo, geuge deo ssayo.

sentences.t: 같이 사면 더 싸서 두 개 샀어요.
sentences.en: I bought two because they were cheaper together.
sentences.r: gachi samyeon deo ssaseo du gae sasseoyo.

sentences.t: 오늘 컨디션 좋아요, 어제보다 훨씬 나아요.
sentences.en: I'm good today, much better than yesterday.
sentences.r: oneul keondisyeon joayo, eojeboda hwolssin naayo.

sentences.en: I'd like to go, but I can't today.
If I go to bed early, I get up feeling better.
It's a bit expensive, but it's fine.
When I'm busy, the day goes by fast.

sentences.t: 잘 자면 일도 공부도 더 잘돼요.
sentences.en: When I sleep well, I work and study better.
sentences.r: jal jamyeon ildo gongbudo deo jaldwaeyo.

sentences.en: I shower fast because I have to work.
I'm fine, but she's tired.
I'm busy now, but later I'm free.
He's a calm guy, but right now he's nervous.
I want to sleep, but I also want to go out with you.
If I'm sad, I talk to a friend.
If you feel bad, go to the doctor.

sentences.t: 그 사람 밝은 사람인데 오늘은 슬퍼요.
sentences.en: She's a cheerful person, but today she's sad.
sentences.r: geu saram balgeun saraminde oneureun seulpeoyo.

sentences.en: I'm a cheerful person, even if sometimes I'm tired.
You have to drink water if you're thirsty.
Don't ask me why, but it works.
Marco says he studies while he showers.
I told you, but you didn't listen to me.
I know the song, but I can't sing it.

sentences.t: 요리할 줄 아는데 이 레시피는 몰라요.
sentences.en: I know how to cook, but I don't know this recipe.
sentences.r: yorihal jul aneunde i resipineun mollayo.

sentences.t: 번호 줬는데 한 번도 전화 안 했어요.
sentences.en: I gave him my number, but he never called.
sentences.r: beonho jwonneunde han beondo jeonhwa an haesseoyo.

sentences.en: If you look properly, you'll find it.

sentences.t: 자, 이거 먹어 봐요, 좋아할 거예요.
sentences.en: Here, try this, you're going to like it.
sentences.r: ja, igeo meogeo bwayo, joahal geoyeyo.

sentences.en: I looked for the answer, but I already knew it.
When I saw it, I couldn't believe it.

sentences.t: 이거 한 번도 안 해 봤는데 진짜 좋아요.
sentences.en: I'd never tried this, but it's amazing.
sentences.r: igeo han beondo an hae bwanneunde jinjja joayo.

sentences.en: If you don't rest, you'll feel worse.
The kitchen's next to my room.
I get up early to study before work.
I don't know what time I'll be back.
The bathroom's next to the kitchen.
She's on the couch with the cat.
I go to bed late and then I don't want to get up.

sentences.t: 가끔 아무것도 하기 싫을 때가 있어요.
sentences.en: Sometimes I feel like doing nothing.
sentences.r: gakkeum amugeotdo hagi sireul ttaega isseoyo.

sentences.t: 마르코는 일찍 일어나서 다섯 개 언어를 공부해요.
sentences.en: Marco gets up early and studies five languages.
sentences.r: raenggwineun iljjik ireonaseo daseot gae eoneoreul gongbuhaeyo.

sentences.en: The couch is next to the window.
I went to my mom's place on Sunday.

sentences.t: 자기 전에 책 조금 읽는 거 좋아해요.
sentences.en: I like to read a little before sleeping.
sentences.r: jagi jeone chaek jogeum ingneun geo joahaeyo.

sentences.en: I'm going to come earlier next time.
What time are you going to leave there?

sentences.t: 서른 되기 전에 세상을 보고 싶어요.
sentences.en: I want to see the world before I turn thirty.
sentences.r: seoreun doegi jeone sesangeul bogo sipeoyo.

sentences.t: 마르코는 매일 아침 여섯 시에 스페인어를 연습해요.
sentences.en: Marco practices Spanish at six every morning.
sentences.r: raenggwineun maeil achim yeoseot sie seupeineoreul yeonseuphaeyo.

sentences.t: 마르코가 저를 보고 말했어요. 다시 연습해.
sentences.en: Marco looked at me and said: practice again.
sentences.r: raenggwiga jeoreul bogo malhaesseoyo. dasi yeonseuphae.

sentences.t: 강아지는 항상 제 침대 밑에서 자요.
sentences.en: The dog always sleeps under my bed.
sentences.r: gangajineun hangsang je chimdae mitteseo jayo.

sentences.en: The window's next to the door.

sentences.t: 다른 거 더 살 돈이 안 남았어요.
sentences.en: I don't have any money left to buy anything else.
sentences.r: dareun geo deo sal doni an namasseoyo.

sentences.en: I've had a headache all day.
